user.title: PerfectDraft Account
user.description: Enter the email address associated with your PerfectDraft account.

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.description: Enter your UserId and RefreshToken from the PerfectDraft app. See the integration documentation for instructions on how to extract these.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PerfectDraft
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter fresh tokens from the PerfectDraft app.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired tokens. Please extract fresh tokens from the PerfectDraft app.

abort.already_configured: This PerfectDraft account is already configured.
